transcript.text:
We finally got their permission
(First time on a video...) It's against our rules
- This is our first time - Really?
(Joongang Haejang)
(The star of the show) Look how it's presented!
(Beef Tripe Hot Pot)
(Beef Tripe Hot Pot) Look how it's full of fat!
(It just can't get better...)
(than this...)
It's crazy
(From udon noodles to fried rice, it's full of surprises) Whoa, this looks really great!
(In a trance...) It's so delicious
(Near Samseong station in Gangnam-gu)
Hello everyone
We're in
Samseong area today

(Right across the street) I think this is near COEX
And I'm here today for
(That choice of menu sounds sus...) some hangover soup actually
(Drank again) I had a quick drink last night...
So I've been craving some soup
And turns out, this place is really famous
(Always serves quality meat...!) The owner was in the livestock industry for 40 years
Everyone said this is a great place
(A must-visit place for soup lovers) If you're into hangover soups
(A must-visit place for soup lovers) you definitely must've heard this place
But they've never done video shooting before
So it was really hard to get the permission
(Somehow) But I made it
(The holy land of soup lovers) Ta-da! We're at 'Joongang Haejang'
Even if I didn't get permission, I was going to try this place anyway...hehe
Hello!

(The place is full of delicious smells from the stew...) It smells delicious!
(The place is full of delicious smells from the stew...) I'm already excited!
(Took a seat) Thank you!
- We never allowed videos before! - Like never?
(Never done before) It's against our rules
(Someone did take it secretly) so only a few took it secretly
- This is our first official filming - Oh, really?
(For the first time) Yay! We're the first ones!
(The owner's a big fan of Tzuyang) I'm a big fan of yours..
(The owner's a big fan of Tzuyang) So I came running to see you
So it's the hot pot that's popular?
- How many servings is it with the large size? - It's for 4 people!
Then I should get 2 large hot pots!
I still want to try everything
- Can I have other menus to go? - Of course, you can
I'll take out the other menus back home

(Just the hot pot) It's going to be a hot pot today!
- I'll have 2 large-size hot pots then! - Got it!
And!
Oh, I almost said
(I want soju) a bottle of soju
(Almost ordered it) We can't do that
(I'll hold it in for now...) Okay, just a cola, please
So it's a pound of beef tripes in the pot
If we were to grill it
It's about 20 servings!
(Originally, it's 6 lbs of meat...) The amount of meat shrinks after blanching it
So it has to be 6 lbs at least
(Here comes the hot pot)
Whoa!
Look how it's presented!
Thank you!

- So it's 4 and 4, a total of 8 servings - Yeap
(And you can eat it alone?)
They look really awesome
(Forgot to mention...) I should've told her about
(Forgot to mention...) this crown daisy in advance...
(We'll make sure to take it out the next time) Go ahead
Alright
let's fire them up
(Click-)
This will make a fantastic hangover soup
They even got udon noodles inside
Ta-da! So that's the noodles
The hangover soup places got great kimchi as well
And it's a pass!
(It's on point..!) Whoa, it's so good!
They both are great

Both the cabbage and radish are great
(Thumbs up)
I can tell it's going to be great even from kimchi
It might not be visible on camera but
there's white broth beneath
(The pot is full of beef tripes) It's got seasoning, beef tripes, mushrooms, jujube, green onions
(The beef tripe is cooked in advance) Usually, you get non-marinated tripes for this dish
(The beef tripe is cooked in advance) But this place serves it seasoned!
Let's mix them up a bit
I want to try this broth first
This place is lit!
Wow, the broth is really great too
(The red color makes it more appetizing...)
Should I try the red version as well?
(No need to explain)
(The hot pot is being cooked properly)

- Should I turn the heat down? - I'll do that!
(Got the sauce ready!)
Bon Appetite!
Well, the soup is
Perfect!
(Rich in flavors..!) It's so thick!
Even the non-seasoned broth tasted great
But this marinade makes it better
(Hangover remedy)
Ugh, this is great
It's so good
This sure is a remedy
But I think...
(It just calls for drinks) This will go well with drinks as well
(Thumbs up)
It's so good!

Beef tripes!
Look at the size of it!
It's delicious! Oh my gosh...!
The stew actually melts away the fat inside
But I can tell
it's still there
It's quite bouncy
and soft and tender as well
It's so good
Whoa!
Most of the places are either serve
soft or chewy ones
But this one is soft AND chewy
(All in all) It's just great
It's so good
Let's get some green onions

and a piece of mushroom
(Impressed)
It's just out of this world
Let's try the mushroom
and beef tripe combo!
It's got so much fat inside!
It's really stuffed with it
(Full of fatty part...!) I can tell it just by looking at it...wow...
Are you
seeing this?
(Purely amazed) Look at it
(Full of fat) I can't believe it's still inside like this!
Oh yeah
I totally forgot
about the sauce
Let's dip it

(A must-try combo!) Even the sauce is good!
(Found a vein of beef tripes) It's literally filled with beef tripes!
(The size and the amount are just perfect) There are so many of them in here!
Wow, check out the color of the soup
It looks amazing
What a perfect dish for hangovers I'm glad I'm a mukbang YouTuber
Enoki mushrooms!
Let's get that in...
(Hot)
(About 3 lbs each) If it's a pound per dish, that means it's at least 3 lbs originally
But the price is great!
(Got heaps inside...) It's just full of beef tripes
I think this is more than 4 servings
Beef tripe really is my soul food
Soul food
(Can't live without you...) Can't get enough of it

I'll get this noodle in
(In it goes!)
(Udon is always a must...)
I should take one out for my friend
(It's always better to share delicious food...) I think this will sober her up
Ugh! It's great
There's plenty to enjoy!
Combo time!
(It's still there..) I think the udon is also about 2 to 4 servings!
You know that moment in hangover soup places
(The moment you sober up...) where you really sober up at a certain point
That's what I'm feeling right now
So delicious!
Even the soup is great
(Heaps of beef tripe) Whoa...
(Heaps of beef tripe) No matter how many times I scoop, I still get them!

5 pieces at one time!
(Automatic refill) Thank you!
(What a great timing...! Haha) How did she know that I ran out of soda?
(Getting the tripes out of the stew...)
(Done scooping them up!) I had to take them out to cool them off!
Let's reduce the soup
so I can...
Since we had noodles, I want fried rice with this
I'm more than happy to be here
I'm working and sobering up at the same time...
(Current time 16:00) This is the least busy time of the day for restaurants
But there are about 50 people already
(Extract from the beef tripe) If I sprinkle some of the soup
Don't you think this will taste better?
Or maybe it should be this side?!
(Should not have done that)

Ma'am, do you have fried rice as well?
- Yeah, would you like one? - Yeah!
- We cook it in here! - Oh, you do it here?!
(That's obvious..) So it's not here?
(What have I done...?)
(In you go)
(Rice is a must for all Koreans..!)
(Rice is a must for all Koreans..!) It's so pleasing to the eyes..
- Can I get this in as well? - Sure thing
(Fried rice with beef tripe and its soup)
(Fried rice with beef tripe and its soup) This looks awesome!
I forgot about this rice at the other restaurant
So I'll be enjoying this to the fullest
It's similar to pork backbone stew!
(Still feeling drunk...?) It's so good!
I'll have...

(Dipping it a bit into the soup!)
(Astonished) Whoa!
You know...
(Beautiful / Delicious) the meme from Chūka Ichiban?!
(It's heavenly...!) It's so good!
Even the rice is perfect!
How should I say this, it's so savory!
Let's get a piece from here
(We all saw it coming)
This happens when the food is great!
(Or maybe it's just you...) Come on! I can't go home like this!
This sauce...
Now that I said it, it was soup actually
Let's get this in!
My grandma taught me this
(The killer move) It's rub and scrub!

(Done collecting)
Let's get the enoki on top
with shiitake
The beef tripe is still there
(They just keep coming...) This stew never runs out of it!
(They just keep coming...) Got many left like this
(Piled up...)
(Ta-da) Another one!
(Ta-da x2) And another one!
I thought it was over, but I still can get them
Uh, it's so good
(Done eating)
(Burst of applause)
Whoa, that was a hearty meal
What a great hangover reliever!
Thanks for another great meal!

(Turns out, she's taking it for another drinking party...) Wait!
(Turns out, she's taking it for another drinking party...)
